privileges.description:
For any accumulated purchase over HK$100 from Mondays to Fridays (excluding public holidays), customers can redeem 2-hour free parking.
For any accumulated purchase over HK$200 from Mondays to Fridays (excluding public holidays), customers can redeem 3-hour free parking.

The redemption limits a maximum of 3-hour free parking from Monday to Friday.
Promotional Hours: 10am to 10pm (Ingress Time)

Terms and Conditions

1. A maximum of two same day sales receipts issued by Domain tenants are accepted for this redemption. Receipt(s) that is/are not redeemed on the day of purchase will be regarded as invalid.
2. Original sales receipt(s) must be presented upon redemption. Revised or re-printed receipts will not be accepted. A valid sales receipt must be machine-printed with merchant name, receipt/invoice number, transaction number, transaction date and amount of transaction. Handwritten receipt is not acceptable.
3. Spending at bank, car park, Octopus add-value service, bill settlement, purchase of gift voucher and related services are excluded.
4. Complimentary parking offer is only valid to shoppers driving into Domain's carpark from 10am to 10pm.
5. Redemption should be made at Customer Care Centre from 10am to 11pm. 
6. Redemption procedures for free parking must be processed and completed at the Customer Care Centre.
7. For every additional hour parked beyond the promotional period, the prevailing parking fee will be duly charged onwards.
Domain reserves the right of free parking redemption.

Note: Same Free Parking Privilege is also applicable for car parking in the carparks of Yau Lai Shopping Centre and Yau Mei Court.

For any accumulated purchase over HK$200 on weekends and public holidays, customers can redeem 1-hour free parking; 
For any accumulated purchase over HK$400 on weekends and public holidays, customers can redeem 2-hour free parking.

The redemption limits a maximum of 2-hour on weekends.

Promotional Hours: 10am to 10pm (Ingress Time)

Terms and Conditions

A valid sales receipt must be machine-printed with merchant name, receipt/invoice number, transaction number, transaction date and amount of transaction. Handwritten receipt is not acceptable.
3.	Spending at bank, car park, Octopus add-value service, bill settlement, purchase of gift voucher and related services are excluded.
4.	Complimentary parking offer is only valid to shoppers driving into Domain's carpark from 10am to 10pm.
5.	Redemption should be made at Customer Care Centre from 10am to 11pm. Redemption procedures for free parking must be processed and completed at the Customer Care Centre.
6.	For every additional hour parked beyond the promotional period, the prevailing parking fee will be duly charged onwards.
7.	Domain reserves the right of free parking redemption.
Note: Same Free Parking Privilege is also applicable for car parking in the carparks of Yau Lai Shopping Centre and Yau Mei Court.
